question: Which airlines have a flight with destination airport AHD?
gold_sql: SELECT T1.Airline FROM AIRLINES AS T1 JOIN FLIGHTS AS T2 ON T1.uid  =  T2.Airline WHERE T2.DestAirport  =  "AHD"
predicted_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.text_1 FROM table_1 AS T1 JOIN table_3 AS T3 ON T1.pk_1 = T3.pk_1 WHERE T3.fk_2 = 'AHD'
raw_response: SELECT DISTINCT T1.text_1 FROM table_1 AS T1 JOIN table_3 AS T3 ON T1.pk_1 = T3.pk_1 WHERE T3.fk_2 = 'AHD'
